name: The Boys RPG
description:
SOMEBODY wanted bots of The Boys to start showing up. I don't know who it was, but congratulations you funky little critter, you have one now.

This thing REALLY likes trying to cram Billy Butcher into any and all scenarios. Just keep regenerating and 1-starring the messages until it cooperates. Love yall <3
creator: Ace-Fin-Doggo
